name: Cefradine
mechanismOfAction: Cefradine is a first generation cephalosporin antibiotic with a spectrum of activity similar to Cefalexin. Cefradine, like the penicillins, is a beta-lactam antibiotic. By binding to specific penicillin-binding proteins (PBPs) located inside the bacterial cell wall, it inhibits the third and last stage of bacterial cell wall synthesis. Cell lysis is then mediated by bacterial cell wall autolytic enzymes such as autolysins; it is possible that Cefradine interferes with an autolysin inhibitor.

interactions.name: Rilpivirine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Rilpivirine can be decreased when it is combined with Cefradine.

interactions.name: BCG vaccine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of BCG vaccine can be decreased when used in combination with Cefradine.

interactions.name: Aripiprazole
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Aripiprazole can be decreased when it is combined with Cefradine.

interactions.name: Picosulfuric acid
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Picosulfuric acid can be decreased when used in combination with Cefradine.

interactions.name: Warfarin
interactions.description: Cefradine may increase the anticoagulant activities of Warfarin.

interactions.name: Dicoumarol
interactions.description: Cefradine may increase the anticoagulant activities of Dicoumarol.

interactions.name: Phenindione
interactions.description: Cefradine may increase the anticoagulant activities of Phenindione.

interactions.name: Phenprocoumon
interactions.description: Cefradine may increase the anticoagulant activities of Phenprocoumon.

interactions.name: Acenocoumarol
interactions.description: Cefradine may increase the anticoagulant activities of Acenocoumarol.

interactions.name: Ethyl biscoumacetate
interactions.description: Cefradine may increase the anticoagulant activities of Ethyl biscoumacetate.

interactions.name: Fluindione
interactions.description: Cefradine may increase the anticoagulant activities of Fluindione.

interactions.name: Clorindione
interactions.description: Cefradine may increase the anticoagulant activities of Clorindione.

interactions.name: Diphenadione
interactions.description: Cefradine may increase the anticoagulant activities of Diphenadione.

interactions.name: Tioclomarol
interactions.description: Cefradine may increase the anticoagulant activities of Tioclomarol.

interactions.name: Probenecid
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Cefradine can be increased when it is combined with Probenecid.

interactions.name: Saxagliptin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Saxagliptin can be decreased when it is combined with Cefradine.
